title: Dashboard as startpage
excerpt: I am hoping for the possibility to set a dashboard as a startpage for my entire team or company… Would this be possible soon?

posts.author: ThomasEik (Thomas Solheim)
posts.cookedHtml: I am hoping for the possibility to set a dashboard as a startpage for my entire team or company… Would this be possible soon?

posts.author: Galit-monday.com (Galit)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @ThomasEik! What do you mean for your entire team/company? You can bookmark any page in monday.com on your browser so you always see it when starting your day Would that work for you and your team members? Are you looking to display the dashboard somehow? I’d love to hear more about your use case so feel free to share it here!

posts.author: ThomasEik (Thomas Solheim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Instead of showing “inbox” as the first page to show up when starting monday.com, I would like to ensure that all my members see the same information as I do. Dashboards I think is good for this.
So my wish is to be able to broadcast a dashboard to specific members, or to my entire company. When they open monday.com they would see my customized dashboard which contains important information an smart shortcuts and so on…

posts.author: Galit-monday.com (Galit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for sharing this! I would suggest for right now to have your team members bookmark the dashboard you want them to view when logging in. In the meantime, I will share this with our product team as I do see how this could be helpful.

Would it help if you had an admin only ability to set a page in your monday.com account as the default page for everyone when logging in?

Let me know and I’d be happy to write this up as a feature request with our team

posts.author: ThomasEik (Thomas Solheim)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks. Yes, it would help if admin could choose default startup-page for the company. But, I think the most needed startup-page instead of inbox, is a “company-customized” dashboard…

posts.author: kody.vansistine (Kody Vansistine)
posts.cookedHtml: I second this inquiry. Broadcasting a single board has much less utility than broadcasting an actual dashboard with data points from multiple sources.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello from Argentina,
we need in our company this function too.
and perhaps the possibility of rotating the different dashboards to broadcast them on TV`s, with a behaviour similar to pulse TV function.

posts.author: ctberlin (Craig Berlin)
posts.cookedHtml: Having the same problem in my operation. Need this feature.

posts.author: Topio (Javier Silva)
posts.cookedHtml: I think this would be even more useful

posts.author: Topio (Javier Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dashboards are web pages. Web page rotation is a browser extension away

*Please note that this is an external link

Automatically cycle through web pages - Stack Overflow

posts.author: Firenta_Andy (Andrew Causton)
posts.cookedHtml: Not sure if this was every made possible, but I would also like to see this. When you login to Monday.com, the dashboard for your company should the primary focal point and the first thing you see.

posts.author: Ukey (Uros Vukasinovic)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Galit-monday.com Is there any update on this? I am strill trying to find such option.

If anyone knows if there’s an extension app to this, it would be super helpful!

Edit: Found the solution to this on this post here. Seems like it’s possible only on Enterprise account.
